Data Processing & Retention Note — PT Nusantara Quantum Pay Tbk. (Perseroan) for regulator disclosure and acquisition workflow.
This memo governs processing of PII under UU PDP and MNPI under capital markets rules in relation to a proposed acquisition of PT Cakrawala Dompet Digital.
Company identifiers: NPWP Perseroan 12.345.678.9-012.345; NIB 1200001234567; kantor terdaftar di Jl. Kenanga Barat No. 88, Kota Sembada, Prov. Meranti Jaya 12999.
Contact for DSAR: DPO Ibu Sari Lestari, dpo@nusantarapaya.co.id, +62-21-555-0199; this channel accepts access/erasure requests within 30 hari.
Public helpline 150-0000 is not a DSAR channel and submissions there will not be processed.
We may collect NIK, NPWP, Paspor RI, nomor rekening, alamat, nomor ponsel, and email when onboarding employees and counterparties in fintech operations.
Example identifiers processed for diligence: NIK 9876543210987654, Paspor RI XZ1234567, and rekening PT Cakrawala Dompet Digital di Bank Fiksi Nusantara 0099887766.
The following item is a generic placeholder and not treated as PII: NIK/No. KTP: __________.
Invalid tax record numbers (e.g., NPWP 00.000.000.0-000.000) submitted in forms will be rejected and not stored.
Processing purposes include compliance with peraturan Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Nusantara (OJN) dan Bursa Efek Nusantara (BEN) for issuer disclosure where required.
MNPI such as draft Board Memo by Bapak Dr. Aditya Prasetyo (Direktur) on acquisition pricing and synergy estimates will be access-restricted and logged.
Any transfer to processors in Singapore will use kontrak pengikat setara SCC, and logs will record processor name, timestamp, and data fields.
Retention: employment data kept 5 tahun post-termination; vendor KYC retained 7 tahun; MNPI retained until public disclosure on BEN then archived for 10 tahun.
Data subjects may request access via email and must provide two factors (e.g., nomor ponsel +62-812-3456-7890 and token SMS) before we disclose copies.
Role-only references (mis., "Direktur Utama", "Komisaris") in minutes are not PII unless combined with other data.
Questions on this note may also be addressed to legal@nusantarapaya.co.id; no securities codes or investor account numbers should be included in emails.
